final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a sunny park scene viewed from slightly below and in front of the main subjects. The central foreground features a man standing next to a golden retriever seated on the ground. The man is wearing a light blue button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. His curly hair is visible, and he is smiling at the camera. To his right (viewer's left), a large tree trunk rises vertically, its branches extending overhead. The ground beneath them is covered in fresh white snow, with subtle footprints visible around their feet. Soft shadows of the man, dog, and tree are cast onto the snow, appearing slightly diffused and aligned with the bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right. In the background, two wooden park benches are placed symmetrically — one on the left side of the frame and one on the right. Beyond the benches, a wide expanse of green grass stretches toward a distant body of water, with a faint outline of a cityscape on the horizon. The sky above is a clear, bright blue with a few wispy clouds. The lighting is natural daylight, creating a cool, crisp atmosphere typical of a snowy day. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing the subject directly; Spatial layout: The man and dog are centered in the foreground. A tree trunk is visible to the left of the man. Two park benches are in the background, one on the left and one on the right. The grassy area extends to the horizon where a body of water and distant cityscape are visible; Dominant color palette: Bright greens from the grass, light blue from the sky, and warm tones from the man's clothing and the dog's fur; Lighting quality and direction: Bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right, casting soft shadows to the left of the man and dog. Style reference: Lighting quality and direction: Bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right, casting soft shadows to the left of the man and dog; Spatial layout: The man and dog are centered in the foreground. A tree trunk is visible to the left of the man. Two park benches are in the background, one on the left and one on the right. The grassy area extends to the horizon where a body of water and distant cityscape are visible; Surface materials and textures: Green grass with short blades; smooth skin and fabric textures on the man and dog; wooden texture on the park benches; Dominant color palette: Bright greens from the grass, light blue from the sky, and warm tones from the man's clothing and the dog's fur.

constraints: The photograph is taken from an eye-level perspective, facing the main subjects directly.
The central foreground features a man standing next to a golden retriever seated on the ground.
The man is wearing a light blue button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers.
The man has curly hair and is smiling at the camera.
To the viewer's left of the man, there is a large tree trunk rising vertically with branches extending overhead.
The ground beneath the man and dog is covered in fresh white snow.
There are subtle footprints visible around the feet of the man and dog.
Soft shadows of the man, dog, and tree are cast onto the snow, appearing slightly diffused.
In the background, two wooden park benches are placed symmetrically — one on the left side of the frame and one on the right.
Beyond the benches, there is a wide expanse of green grass stretching toward a distant body of water.
A faint outline of a cityscape is visible on the horizon beyond the grassy area.
The sky above is a clear, bright blue with a few wispy clouds.
The lighting is natural daylight, creating a cool, crisp atmosphere typical of a snowy day.
The image is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors.
The dominant color palette includes bright greens from the grass, light blue from the sky, and warm tones from the man's clothing and the dog's fur.
The lighting quality and direction indicate bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right, casting soft shadows to the left of the man and dog.
The spatial layout shows the man and dog centered in the foreground, with a tree trunk visible to the left of the man and two park benches in the background on either side.
The surface materials and textures include short-bladed green grass, smooth skin and fabric textures on the man and dog, and wooden texture on the park benches.
